title: cozytempl Helm values
description: Schema enforced by helm install --dry-run and IDE validators. Every field in values.yaml must have a matching rule here so a typo fails fast instead of rendering a silently-wrong Deployment.

tag.description: Image tag. Empty string falls back to Chart.appVersion.

replicaCount.description: Number of cozytempl replicas. Sessions are cookie-stored, so horizontal scaling works without sticky sessions.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in generated resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the fully qualified release-prefixed resource name.

ingress.description: Optional networking.k8s.io/v1 Ingress. Disabled by default; flip ingress.enabled=true to render it.

className.description: IngressClass name. Empty leaves the selection to the cluster's default IngressClass.

httpRoute.description: Optional gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1 HTTPRoute. Disabled by default; flip httpRoute.enabled=true to render it.

rules.description: List of HTTPRouteRule entries. Empty renders a single catch-all PathPrefix `/` rule. Each rule carries its own matches / filters / weight.

matches.description: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1 HTTPRouteMatch entries. Freeform to stay compatible with every upstream match type.

filters.description: Per-rule HTTPRouteFilter entries (HeaderModifier, RequestRedirect, URLRewrite, etc.).

weight.description: Per-rule backendRef weight for canary splits. Omit for an unweighted rule.

resources.description: Container resource requests and limits. Freeform to accept any valid k8s resource map.

listenAddr.description: Address the server binds to. Default ':8080' binds all interfaces on port 8080.

authMode.description: Authentication mode. Passthrough forwards OIDC ID tokens to the k8s API; byok uses a per-user uploaded kubeconfig; token accepts a pasted Bearer token; dev disables auth; impersonation-legacy uses Impersonate headers.

devMode.description: Legacy opt-in for dev mode. Equivalent to authMode=dev and wins when both are set. NEVER enable in production.

trustForwardedHeaders.description: When true, the pre-auth IP rate limiter on /auth/kubeconfig and /auth/token parses X-Forwarded-For. Only safe behind a trusted proxy (Ingress, Cloudflare Tunnel) that strips client-supplied XFF. Default false keys the limiter strictly on TCP RemoteAddr.

debugPprofAddr.description: Bind address for a dedicated net/http/pprof listener (e.g. 'localhost:6060'). Empty disables. NEVER bind on a network an attacker can reach; reach via `kubectl port-forward`.

internalIssuerURL.description: Optional backend-only issuer URL for token endpoint / JWKS calls. Leave empty to reuse issuerURL for both user-facing redirects and backend token exchange.

sessionSecret.description: 32+ random bytes. Generate with `openssl rand -base64 32`. Required when devMode is false and existingSecret is unset.

existingSecret.description: Name of an existing Secret holding keys `oidc-client-secret` and `session-secret`. If set, the chart skips creating its own Secret.

tracing.description: OpenTelemetry tracing configuration. Leave otlpEndpoint empty to disable tracing entirely; the global TracerProvider stays at its zero-cost default.

otlpEndpoint.description: OTLP collector endpoint, e.g. tempo.observability:4317 (gRPC) or http://tempo:4318 (HTTP).

serviceName.description: service.name attribute on spans. Defaults to 'cozytempl' when empty.

create.description: Render ClusterRole / ClusterRoleBinding / watcher SA according to the active authMode. Disable only if RBAC is wired externally.

enabled.description: Render the cozytempl-watcher ServiceAccount and narrow ClusterRole (list+watch on helmreleases). Automatically skipped in dev mode.

formDefinition.description: FormDefinition CRD wiring — UI overlays that override the schema-driven form renderer per-kind.

create.description: Render the ClusterRoleBinding that grants get/list/watch on FormDefinitions to ordinary users. Required for FormDefinition overlays to take effect — users fetch FormDefinitions through their own impersonated identity.

subjects.description: Binding subjects. Empty defaults to Group system:authenticated. Override to scope to a specific group or SAs.

networkPolicy.description: Optional networking.k8s.io/v1 NetworkPolicy. Disabled by default.

podDisruptionBudget.description: Optional policy/v1 PodDisruptionBudget. Only rendered when enabled=true AND replicaCount>1.

minAvailable.description: Integer pod count or percentage string (e.g. '50%'). Mutually exclusive with maxUnavailable.

maxUnavailable.description: Integer pod count or percentage string. Mutually exclusive with minAvailable.

autoscaling.description: Optional autoscaling/v2 HorizontalPodAutoscaler. Disabled by default.

targetCPUUtilizationPercentage.description: Integer percentage (0-100). Empty string disables the CPU metric.

targetMemoryUtilizationPercentage.description: Integer percentage (0-100). Empty string disables the memory metric.

customMetrics.description: Free-form list of autoscaling/v2 MetricSpec entries.

serviceMonitor.description: Optional monitoring.coreos.com/v1 ServiceMonitor for Prometheus Operator.

vpa.description: Optional autoscaling.k8s.io/v1 VerticalPodAutoscaler. Disabled by default.

resourcePolicy.description: VPA ResourcePolicy passed through verbatim. Use to exclude containers or cap min/max bounds.
